div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in China (Johnson)
div.p:
20. Your 75, December 17, 2 p.m. The Department feels that you should avoid advising the Chinese Government with respect to specific measures but you may emphasize the urgent and vital considerations
involved, bearing in mind the general objectives of the Department’s telegram no. 339, December 12, 3 p.m., to the American Embassy in Tokyo. For your information there is given below the text of a telegram being sent to the American Embassy in Tokyo:
[Here follows quotation of Department’s telegram No. 366, December 21, 6 p.m., supra.]
